message:
fix: reserved words in toCode, sidecar try/catch, timer finally

- toCode() now skips JS reserved words (new, return, class, etc.) as
  variable names, falling back to positional names like node1, node2
- Sidecar write wrapped in try/catch — never fails the render
- Timer clearTimeout moved to finally block — no leak on sync throw
- Add test for reserved word handling
